title: Mario Coughs a Cob
description:
Yoshi goes to school on spring break, oogtar gives the princess an unpleasant gift, Tomo gets hit with stuff, Koopa pays Ganon a visit, Hip and Hop bang a pipe against a counter, and the world plunges into chaos.

This was before I had access to Adobe Premere. I tried emulating a few gags here and there that Yaminomenthothamos did in one of his old SMW poops. This ambition was halted by overall poor excecution.
